questions.text: What distinguishes a real-time system from a general-purpose system?

answers.text: It must run on specialized hardware
Correctness depends on both logic and timing
It must use a real-time operating system
It processes data faster than non-real-time systems

questions.text: In a hard real-time system, what happens when a deadline is missed?

answers.text: The result is still useful but lower quality
It is considered a system failure

questions.text: Which term describes the variation in task execution time?
